text_original: It doesn't seem to be gem driven and the chats are fun and immersive. Even without a subscription, this is a high value item. also I seem to have a lifetime subscription which includes all the other subscriptions, and though I don't remember doing it, I wouldn't have done unless it was relatively inexpensive. And I checked, yes, it's not gem driven. checked my gem count before sending a message and after, and it didn't change. So you only use gems to get photos or perks.
text_zh: 它似乎不是由钻石驱动的，聊天过程既有趣又有沉浸感。即使没有订阅，这也是一个价值很高的项目。而且我似乎拥有终身订阅，包含了所有其他订阅内容，虽然我不记得什么时候买的了，但除非它相对便宜，否则我不会买。我检查过了，是的，它不是钻石驱动的。我在发送消息前后检查了钻石数量，它没有变化。所以你只在获取照片或特权时才使用钻石。
reply_original:
Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is so wonderful to hear that you are enjoying the immersive chats and finding high value in Fantasia. 

You are absolutely right—we want the core conversation experience to be accessible, so gems are only used for special perks like generating photos.
reply_zh:
哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！很高兴听到您喜欢这种沉浸式的聊天体验，并发现 Fantasia 的巨大价值。

您说得完全正确——我们希望核心对话体验是人人皆可享用的，所以宝石仅用于生成照片等特殊福利。
